animals.name: Deshi Shahi Cow
animals.description: Sourced directly from the rural pastures of Bogura, this Deshi Shahi cow is a prime example of health and vitality. Raised on a strictly organic diet of natural grass, hay, and oilseed cake, it is free from any growth hormones or harmful chemicals. Its shiny coat and robust physical structure make it a top choice for Qurbani. With a calm temperament and excellent meat quality, it is perfectly suited for a safe and traditional family sacrifice.

animals.name: Red Chittagong Cow
animals.description: The Red Chittagong Cattle (RCC) is one of the most prestigious and sought-after breeds in Bangladesh. This bull features a powerful, muscular build and a distinctive deep red coat. Known for having thin bones and a high meat-to-bone ratio, it promises a significant yield of premium, tender meat. It has been raised in the hilly, natural environment of Chittagong, ensuring it is agile, healthy, and ready for a grand Qurbani celebration.

animals.name: Sahiwal Cow
animals.description: Hailing from a specialized farm in Rajshahi, this Sahiwal cow is recognized by its attractive reddish-brown color and prominent dewlap. This breed is highly valued for both its dairy potential and high-quality meat. Currently weighing 260kg, the cow is very active and has undergone regular veterinary check-ups and vaccinations. It offers a well-balanced ratio of meat and fat, making it a high-value option for a reasonable budget.

animals.name: Black Bengal Goat
animals.description: The pride of Bangladesh, the Black Bengal goat is world-renowned for its exceptionally flavorful and tender meat. This 1.5-year-old goat has been raised in an organic environment in Sylhet. It features a jet-black, glossy coat and a very active personality. For those looking for a compact yet high-quality sacrifice, this disease-free and energetic goat is the perfect choice.

animals.name: Jamunapari Goat
animals.description: Known for its iconic long ears and tall stature, this Jamunapari goat has been carefully raised in a Dhaka-based farm. It stands significantly taller than local breeds and has a majestic appearance. At 2 years old and weighing 40kg, it is in peak physical condition. Its impressive growth and active nature make it a standout choice for anyone seeking a royal-looking animal for their Qurbani.

animals.name: Beetal Goat
animals.description: This Beetal breed goat is a heavyweight in the small animal category. Sourced from a reputable farm in Khulna, it has been fed a high-protein diet including Napier grass and quality grains. As a castrated male, it has a perfect balance of muscle and healthy fat, ensuring superior meat quality. It is sturdy, well-proportioned, and visually impressive.

animals.name: Deshi Goat
animals.description: This premium castrated male goat from Bogura has been nurtured for 3 years with extreme care. It offers the classic, rich taste of local goat meat that is highly preferred in the Bangladeshi market. Weighing 52kg, it is well-fattened but maintains a lean meat profile. It is a healthy, tradition-compliant choice for a family Qurbani.

animals.name: Deshi Large Goat
animals.description: Sourced from a marginal farm in Mymensingh, this large castrated male goat is exceptionally well-grown for its breed. At 3.5 years old, it has reached a significant weight of 58kg. It is a very healthy and active animal, raised in a natural environment. This is an excellent option for buyers who prefer a large goat with the authentic taste of local breeds.

animals.name: Dumba Sheep
animals.description: A unique attraction for Qurbani, this Dumba sheep features the iconic 'fat tail' and was raised in a specialized farm in Sirajganj. Its meat is prized for a distinct flavor profile that sets it apart from traditional goats or sheep. It has been fully acclimated to the local climate and is in perfect health. Perfect for those looking to add a touch of Middle Eastern tradition to their sacrifice.

animals.name: Deshi Camel
animals.description: A symbol of prestige and tradition, this 6-year-old local Deshi camel has been raised under expert supervision in Dhaka. It possesses incredible physical strength and a robust frame. Fed on a specialized nutrient-rich diet, it is fully vaccinated and in peak health. For a grand and unique Qurbani experience, this camel offers both high meat yield and significant cultural value.

animals.name: Premium Camel
animals.description: This is our most exclusive and premium camel, weighing a massive 580kg. Raised in the dry, suitable climate of Rajshahi, it has been monitored closely to ensure it meets the highest standards for sacrifice. Its majestic appearance and sheer size make it a centerpiece for large-scale or joint Qurbani events. It is healthy, compliant with religious age requirements, and represents the pinnacle of sacrificial animals.

animals.name: Holstein Friesian Cow
animals.description: This Holstein Friesian bull from Jessore is a giant among cattle. With its classic black-and-white patched coat and enormous frame, it is sure to stand out. Weighing 390kg, it promises a vast amount of quality meat. Raised on a diet of silage and high-quality grains, this bull is a magnificent choice for those looking for a large-scale sacrifice with a professional farm background.

animals.name: Sindhi Cow
animals.description: Raised in the favorable environment of Comilla, this pure Sindhi bull is known for its high heat tolerance and resilient health. Sindhi meat is famous for being tender and having a rich flavor. At 310kg, this healthy bull features a smooth, deep red coat and bright, lively eyes—classic indicators of a well-maintained and disease-free animal.

animals.name: Premium Goat
animals.description: This 4-year-old premium castrated male goat from Gazipur is the heaviest in our collection at 65kg. It has been specially fattened for Qurbani using high-end feed, resulting in an excellent meat-to-fat ratio. Its glossy coat and impressive weight make it a luxury choice for goat sacrifice. If you are looking for the best possible quality in a local breed, this is the one.
